description: Local PHA overrides for ProgramGate_HUDVASH_HCV_S8. Keep core logic unchanged; customize here.

hudVashSpecialRestrictions: Example: no roommates (confirm with PHA/HUD-VASH team)

leaseTerm.notes: Lease term handling varies; do not hard-fail on assumptions.

notes: Populate payment standards per ZIP and bedroom size.
Populate utility allowance schedule per ZIP, bedroom size, and responsibility pattern key.
If your search logic uses a bedroom cap (studio->0, 1BR+->1), pass approvalBedroomCapSize accordingly.
If your schedule ignores internet, omit 'internet=...' in keys; the resolver attempts a fallback match.
